title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sarovar Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sarovar Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Sarovar Hotels in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sarovar Hotels:
Sarovar Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sarovar Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
